_for: Any SW 13.x firmware — Di3 platform (Atto 3, Yuan Plus)
_howToAdd: Put modules here if they work on any Di3 SW 13.x version.

modules.name: Android Auto
modules.description: Enables Android Auto on BYD Di3. Patched APK with certificate bypass and SSL pinning disabled.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: CarPlay + MFi Hook
modules.description: Apple CarPlay via MFi emulation (LD_PRELOAD). Requires donor DI3 on same Wi-Fi.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: Arabic UI Language Pack
modules.description: Patches 13 system APKs with Arabic RTL: AutoVideo, BluetoothPhone, BydBootGuide, CarSetting, Launcher3 and more.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: Google Mobile Services
modules.description: Google Play Services and core GMS.
modules.author: ashrafnaji

modules.name: OTA Update Bypass
modules.description: Redirects OTA checks to local mock. Prevents unwanted firmware updates.
modules.author: ashrafnaji
